name: Max Verstappen - Ex's Bestfriend
description:
"get your shit together before someone takes your girl from you."

🍓🫐🍓🫐🍓🫐🍓

kicking screaming crying at the thought of ex boyfriend's bestfriend max threatening to steal you away from your bf if he doesn't treat you better!!! also slipped in a college au bc i felt like it, max is a mechanical engineering student bc i'm self indulgent

oscar and daniel are mentioned bc i love them but the ex-boyfriend is not specified so feel free to do whatever u want with that

also it's set in a club because i cannot stop thinking about max partying. save me party max please save me (frat boy au next?)

cw: potential cheating? nothing actually happens in the prompt but depending on how you lead it it could definitely delve into that area quick. also from the testing i've done he has a pretty short temper in this and is usually quick to throw a punch at the ex so cw for minor violence!
creator: versappen
